description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a predominantly light gray exterior and a slightly darker tinted window on the front door. The front face features a large, curved rectangular window and two prominent round dials stacked vertically on the right side, likely for setting time and power levels. The door handle is integrated into the right edge of the door, blending smoothly with the overall design. Ventilation openings are visible on the left and rear panels, with a perforated metal section and a power cord emerging from the back. The top and sides are flat and unadorned, except for subtle panel lines and a few indented shapes. The overall appearance is utilitarian and modern, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A compact, light gray microwave oven with a front window, two control dials, and visible side and rear vents. The design is modern and functional, with a smooth, flat exterior.
description_view_0: Left side view showing a plain panel with a recessed geometric shape and no visible controls or vents.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a large, perforated vent area, a power cord, and a flat metal back panel.
description_view_2: Right side view with a small vent near the bottom and a plain surface above.
description_view_3: Front view featuring a large tinted window, two round control dials on the right, and an integrated door handle.
attribute_brand_logo: A small brand logo is present on the upper left corner of the front panel, printed in dark text.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel consists of two large, round dials arranged vertically on the right side of the front face. The dials are likely labeled for time and power settings, with no visible digital display or additional buttons.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is integrated into the right edge of the door, forming a vertical grip that is flush with the surface. It appears to be made of plastic and is designed for easy pulling.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are located on the lower right side panel (rectangular with slits) and across a large perforated section on the rear panel. The vent openings are rectangular or circular and distributed for effective airflow.
attribute_window_presence: A large, curved rectangular transparent window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface.
